pr.title: Non-Record: 11L Parallel Muon + LN Scale + LeakyReLU² MLP3x + Legal TTT — val_bpb 1.1215 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Parallel Muon parameter banking pairs depth-scaled LN with LeakyReLU² MLP3x and legal score-first TTT adaptation before GPTQ-lite quantization.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal score-first TTT runs SGD adaptation on each validation chunk before scoring, so those weight updates occur solely on the validation shards.
techniques: Parallel Muon banking with batched Newton-Schulz synchronization
Depth-aware LN Scale plus LeakyReLU² MLP3x within gated/XSA attention blocks
Legal score-first TTT SGD adaptation per 32K chunk prior to GPTQ-lite quantization
